---
title: "Miss Kekewich"
---

## Miss Kekewich

### Description

correspondent

### Biography

Possibly Alice Agatha Kekewich (d. 1919), niece of Frances Mary Peard and eldest daughter of Trehawke Kekewich;  she married (1886) the Rev. Charles Ridley Carr (b.1840). [LG 1952 Ellison; 1906 Kekewich]

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th 1877 

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
